name: Barkelona
detailed_description: Barkelona is a full-immersion game for Spanish learners to practice their vocabulary. While exploring the world of Barkelona, students will converse with dogs and humans, practicing basic conversation questions such as Cómo te llamas and De dónde eres. They will also read stories at the library, go on quests to help their new friends, and learn new words by clicking on objects. They can go shopping in the city’s famous market and go swimming at the beach. As they play Barkelona, students will have fun while reading thousands of words of text.
